---
name: Documentation update
about: Suggest or request documentation improvements
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation Area

Which file or section needs an update?

Examples: README, workflow guide, team roles, architecture, roadmap.

## What Should Change?

Describe the documentation change needed.

## Why Is This Needed?

Explain how this helps the team or users.

## Suggested Text or Structure

Add draft wording if you have it.

## Checklist

- [ ] The wording should be beginner-friendly
- [ ] Commands should be tested if included
- [ ] Links should be checked
